name: Funnel Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients (except oil) in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Heat the oil in a small skillet to 360 degrees F (180 C).
3. Cover the funnel opening with your finger and pour in about 1/2 cup of batter.
4. Remove your finger to allow the batter to flow into the hot oil.
5. Swirl the funnel to create a spiral shape.
6. Fry on each side until golden brown, then drain on paper towels.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
